title: CNBC's UK Exchange newsletter: Why UK bonds bore the brunt of the Iran sell-off
summary_full: The rise in borrowing costs has grave implications for the UK government's ability to hit its fiscal targets should the conflict remain protracted.
summary_public: The rise in borrowing costs has grave implications for the UK government's ability to hit its fiscal targets should the conflict remain protracted.
